sentences.sentence: Next month, a chess player named Timur Gareyev will take on nearly 50 opponents at once.
sentences.translation: 下个月，一位名叫帖木儿·加列耶夫的棋手将同时迎战近50名对手。

structure.text: a chess player named Timur Gareyev

difficult_points: named Timur Gareyev 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 a chess player。
will take on 表示即将挑战或迎战，指未来安排。
at once 表示“同时”，是理解挑战难度的关键信息。

sentences.sentence: But that is not the hard part.
sentences.translation: 但那还不是困难的部分。
difficult_points: But 引出转折，提示真正困难的内容还在后面。
that 指上一句同时对弈近50人的安排。
the hard part 用定冠词 the 表示作者接下来要突出真正难点。

sentences.sentence: While his challengers will play the games as normal, Gareyev himself will be blindfolded.
sentences.translation: 他的挑战者会像平常一样下棋，而加列耶夫本人将被蒙上眼睛。

structure.text: While his challengers will play the games as normal
will play the games as normal

difficult_points: While 在这里表示对比，而不只是时间上的“当……时”。
as normal 表示挑战者仍按正常方式下棋。
himself 强调 Gareyev 本人，与 challengers 形成对比。
will be blindfolded 是将来时被动语态，说明他会被蒙眼。

sentences.sentence: Even by world record standards, it sets a high bar for human performance.
sentences.translation: 即使用世界纪录的标准衡量，这也为人类表现设立了很高的门槛。
difficult_points: Even by... 表示即便按照很高的世界纪录标准来看。
it 指蒙眼同时对弈近50人的挑战。
sets a high bar 是固定表达，表示设定很高标准。
for human performance 说明这个标准衡量的是人类能力表现。

sentences.sentence: The 28-year-old already stands out in the rarefied world of blindfold chess.
sentences.translation: 这位28岁的棋手已经在蒙眼国际象棋这个精英而小众的领域中脱颖而出。

structure.text: in the rarefied world of blindfold chess

difficult_points: The 28-year-old 用年龄代指 Gareyev。
stands out 表示“突出、脱颖而出”，不是字面站出来。
rarefied world 指少数精英参与的特殊领域。
of blindfold chess 限定这个领域是蒙眼棋。

sentences.sentence: He has a fondness for bright clothes and unusual hairstyles, and he gets his kicks from the adventure sport of BASE jumping.
sentences.translation: 他喜欢鲜艳的衣服和不同寻常的发型，并从低空跳伞这项冒险运动中获得刺激感。

structure.text: He has a fondness for bright clothes and unusual hairstyles
from the adventure sport of BASE jumping

difficult_points: has a fondness for 表示“喜爱”，比 like 更书面。
and 连接两个关于 Gareyev 个性的独立分句。
gets his kicks from 是习语，表示从某事中获得兴奋或乐趣。
BASE jumping 是冒险运动名称，解释他喜欢刺激的性格。

sentences.sentence: He has already proved himself a strong chess player, too.
sentences.translation: 而且他也已经证明自己是一名实力强劲的棋手。
difficult_points: has already proved 是现在完成时，强调已取得的证明结果。
proved himself a strong chess player 是“动词 + 宾语 + 宾补”结构。
too 表示除个性鲜明外，他在棋艺上也很强。

sentences.sentence: In a 10-hour chess marathon in 2013, Gareyev played 33 games in his head simultaneously.
sentences.translation: 在2013年的一场10小时国际象棋马拉松中，加列耶夫在脑中同时进行了33盘棋。
difficult_points: In a 10-hour chess marathon in 2013 提供时间和事件背景。
in his head 表示这些棋局是在脑中进行，而非看着棋盘。
simultaneously 强调多盘棋同时进行，是本句的关键难度信息。

sentences.sentence: He won 29 and lost none.
sentences.translation: 他赢了29盘，一盘也没有输。
difficult_points: won 29 省略了 games，需要从上一句补出。
none 指没有一盘棋，而不是没有人。
won 与 lost 并列形成成绩对比，突出战绩强。

sentences.sentence: The skill has become his brand: he calls himself the Blindfold King.
sentences.translation: 这项技能已经成了他的个人品牌：他自称“蒙眼棋王”。

structure.text: he calls himself the Blindfold King

difficult_points: has become 是现在完成时，说明这项技能已经形成持续影响。
brand 在这里指个人形象或标签，不是商品品牌。
冒号后的分句解释“品牌”的具体体现。
calls himself the Blindfold King 是“动词 + 宾语 + 宾补”结构。

sentences.sentence: But Gareyev's prowess has drawn interest from beyond the chess-playing community.
sentences.translation: 但加列耶夫的非凡能力已经吸引了国际象棋圈之外的人们的兴趣。
difficult_points: But 引出话题转向：关注者不再局限于棋界。
prowess 表示高超能力或技艺，是本句的关键词。
from beyond... 表示兴趣来自某个群体之外。
chess-playing community 指下棋者或国际象棋群体。

sentences.sentence: In the hope of understanding how he and others like him can perform such mental feats, researchers at the University of California in Los Angeles (UCLA) called him in for tests.
sentences.translation: 为了理解他以及像他这样的人如何能完成这样的脑力壮举，洛杉矶加利福尼亚大学（UCLA）的研究人员把他叫来接受测试。

structure.text: how he and others like him can perform such mental feats
researchers at the University of California in Los Angeles (UCLA)

difficult_points: In the hope of understanding 表示目的，说明研究人员测试他的原因。
how 引导嵌入式疑问结构，作 understanding 的宾语。
he and others like him 指 Gareyev 和类似的蒙眼棋高手。
called him in for tests 表示叫他来接受测试。

sentences.sentence: They now have their first results.
sentences.translation: 他们现在已经有了第一批结果。
difficult_points: They 指前一句 UCLA 的研究人员。
now 表示研究已经进入获得初步结果的阶段。
first results 暗示结果仍是初步的，后文会继续说明。

sentences.sentence: 'The ability to play a game of chess with your eyes closed is not a far reach for most accomplished players,' said Jesse Rissman, who runs a memory lab at UCLA.
sentences.translation: 在 UCLA 运营一间记忆实验室的杰西·里斯曼说：“闭着眼睛下一盘国际象棋的能力，对大多数有成就的棋手来说并不算遥不可及。”

structure.text: 'The ability to play a game of chess with your eyes closed is not a far reach for most accomplished players,'
The ability to play a game of chess with your eyes closed
who runs a memory lab at UCLA

difficult_points: 引号内是直接引语，said Jesse Rissman 是后置引述结构。
The ability to... 是长主语，核心词是 ability。
not a far reach 表示并非难以企及。
who 引导非限定性定语从句，补充 Jesse Rissman 的身份。

sentences.sentence: 'But the thing that's so remarkable about Timur and a few other individuals is the number of games they can keep active at once.
sentences.translation: “但是，帖木儿和少数其他人真正非凡的地方，在于他们能够同时保持进行中的棋局数量。

structure.text: that's so remarkable about Timur and a few other individuals
they can keep active at once

difficult_points: the thing that... is... 是强调式说明结构，真正信息在表语部分。
that's so remarkable... 是定语从句，修饰 the thing。
the number of games 后省略关系词，引出 they can keep active at once。
keep active at once 指在脑中同时维持多盘棋局。

sentences.sentence: To me it is simply astonishing.'
sentences.translation: 在我看来，这简直令人震惊。”
difficult_points: To me 表示说话人的主观评价角度。
it 指前一句提到的同时保持多盘棋局的能力。
simply 加强 astonishing 的语气，表示“简直”。

sentences.sentence: Gareyev learned to play chess in his native Uzbekistan when he was six years old.
sentences.translation: 加列耶夫六岁时在他的祖国乌兹别克斯坦学会了下国际象棋。

structure.text: when he was six years old

difficult_points: learned to play chess 中不定式说明学会的具体技能。
native Uzbekistan 表示他的祖国或出生地乌兹别克斯坦。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明开始学棋的年龄。

sentences.sentence: Tutored by his grandfather, he entered his first tournament aged eight and soon became obsessed with competitions.
sentences.translation: 在祖父的指导下，他八岁参加了自己的第一场比赛，并很快迷上了竞赛。

structure.text: entered his first tournament aged eight
and soon became obsessed with competitions

difficult_points: Tutored by... 是过去分词短语，表示他受祖父指导。
aged eight 是省略结构，表示“在八岁时”。
entered 与 became 并列，描述学棋后的经历发展。
became obsessed with 表示逐渐对比赛着迷。

sentences.sentence: At 16, he was crowned Asia's youngest ever chess grandmaster.
sentences.translation: 16岁时，他被授予亚洲有史以来最年轻的国际象棋特级大师称号。
difficult_points: At 16 表示年龄时间状语。
was crowned 是被动语态，意为“被加冕/被授予称号”。
youngest ever 强调历史范围内最年轻。
Asia's 限定称号比较范围为亚洲。

sentences.sentence: He moved to the US soon after, and as a student helped his university win its first national chess championship.
sentences.translation: 不久后他移居美国，并在学生时期帮助他的大学赢得了首个全国国际象棋冠军。

structure.text: He moved to the US soon after
win its first national chess championship

difficult_points: soon after 指成为特级大师后不久。
as a student 是插入状语，说明帮助大学夺冠时的身份。
helped his university win 是 help 后接宾语和省略 to 的不定式。
its 指 his university，而不是 Gareyev。

sentences.sentence: In 2013, Gareyev was ranked the third best chess player in the US.
sentences.translation: 2013年，加列耶夫被评为美国第三优秀的国际象棋棋手。

structure.text: the third best chess player in the US

difficult_points: was ranked 是被动语态，表示排名由外部评价产生。
the third best 表示第三名或第三优秀，best 前有序数词限定。
in the US 限定排名范围。

sentences.sentence: To the uninitiated, blindfold chess seems to call for superhuman skill.
sentences.translation: 对外行来说，蒙眼国际象棋似乎需要超人的技能。
difficult_points: To the uninitiated 表示“对不了解内情的人来说”。
seems to call for 表示看起来需要某种能力。
superhuman skill 是夸张表达，突出外行眼中的难度。

sentences.sentence: But displays of the feat go back centuries.
sentences.translation: 但这种技艺的展示可以追溯到几个世纪以前。
difficult_points: But 转折说明蒙眼棋并非现代才出现。
the feat 指上一句的蒙眼下棋这种壮举。
go back centuries 表示历史可追溯到数百年前。

sentences.sentence: The first recorded game in Europe was played in 13th-century Florence.
sentences.translation: 欧洲有记录的第一场蒙眼棋比赛是在13世纪的佛罗伦萨进行的。

structure.text: The first recorded game in Europe

difficult_points: recorded 表示有记录的，不一定是历史上第一场。
was played 是被动语态，强调比赛发生地点。
13th-century Florence 是时间加地点组合，指13世纪的佛罗伦萨。

sentences.sentence: In 1947, the Argentinian grandmaster Miguel Najdorf played 45 simultaneous games in his mind, winning 39 in the 24-hour session.
sentences.translation: 1947年，阿根廷特级大师米格尔·纳依多夫在脑中同时进行了45盘棋，并在这场24小时的对局中赢了39盘。
difficult_points: the Argentinian grandmaster Miguel Najdorf 是完整主语，说明人物身份。
simultaneous games 表示同时进行的多盘棋。
in his mind 表示盲棋状态下在脑中进行。
winning 39... 是现在分词短语，补充说明结果。

sentences.sentence: Accomplished players can develop the skill of playing blind even without realising it.
sentences.translation: 有成就的棋手甚至可能在没有意识到的情况下发展出蒙眼下棋的技能。
difficult_points: Accomplished players 指水平较高、有经验的棋手。
the skill of playing blind 中 of playing blind 后置说明技能内容。
even without realising it 表示这种能力可能自然形成而非刻意训练。
it 指自己正在发展这种技能这一事实。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在没有意识到的情况下

sentences.sentence: The nature of the game is to run through possible moves in the mind to see how they play out.
sentences.translation: 这项游戏的本质，就是在脑中推演各种可能的走法，看看它们会如何发展。

structure.text: to run through possible moves in the mind
to see how they play out

difficult_points: The nature of the game 是主语，说明国际象棋本身的认知特点。
to run through... 是表语不定式，解释游戏本质。
to see... 表示推演走法的目的。
how they play out 是嵌入式疑问结构，指走法会如何发展。

sentences.sentence: From this, regular players develop a memory for the patterns the pieces make, the defences and attacks.
sentences.translation: 由此，普通棋手会形成对棋子所构成的模式、防守和进攻的记忆。

structure.text: a memory for the patterns the pieces make, the defences and attacks

difficult_points: From this 指从脑中推演可能走法的过程。
a memory for... 表示对某类信息形成记忆。
the patterns the pieces make 中省略了关系词 that/which。
the defences and attacks 与 the patterns 并列，都是记忆对象。

sentences.sentence: 'You recreate it in your mind,' said Gareyev.
sentences.translation: 加列耶夫说：“你会在脑中重新构建它。”
difficult_points: 直接引语在前，said Gareyev 在后，是新闻报道常见引述结构。
recreate 表示在脑中重新构建棋盘局面。
it 指棋局或棋盘状态。
in your mind 强调盲棋依赖心理表征。

sentences.sentence: 'A lot of players are capable of doing what I'm doing.'
sentences.translation: “很多棋手都有能力做我正在做的事。”
difficult_points: A lot of players 表示许多棋手，Gareyev 在淡化单盘盲棋的难度。
be capable of doing 是固定结构，of 后接动名词。
what I'm doing 是名词性从句，作 doing 的宾语。
I'm doing 指蒙眼下棋这件事。

sentences.sentence: The real mental challenge comes from playing multiple games at once in the head.
sentences.translation: 真正的脑力挑战来自在脑中同时进行多盘棋。
difficult_points: real mental challenge 与前文“单盘盲棋不难”形成对比。
comes from 后接动名词短语，说明挑战来源。
multiple games at once 强调真正难点是多盘同时进行。
in the head 表示所有棋局都靠脑中记忆维持。

sentences.sentence: Not only must the positions of each piece on every board be memorised, they must be recalled faithfully when needed, updated with each player's moves, and then reliably stored again, so the brain can move on to the next board.
sentences.translation: 不仅每块棋盘上每个棋子的位置都必须被记住，还必须在需要时准确回忆出来，随着每位棋手的走棋更新，然后再次可靠地存储起来，这样大脑才能转向下一块棋盘。

structure.text: Not only must the positions of each piece on every board be memorised
the positions of each piece on every board
they must be recalled faithfully when needed
so the brain can move on to the next board

difficult_points: Not only 位于句首触发部分倒装，must 提到主语前。
they 指 the positions of each piece on every board。
recalled, updated, stored 是一系列被动动作，说明大脑处理每盘棋的步骤。
so 引导结果状语从句，说明完成存储后大脑才能转向下一棋盘。

sentences.sentence: First moves can be tough to remember because they are fairly uninteresting.
sentences.translation: 开局走法可能很难记住，因为它们相当乏味。
difficult_points: First moves 指棋局开始阶段的走法。
tough to remember 是形容词加不定式结构，表示难以记住。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释难记的原因。
they 指 First moves。

sentences.sentence: But the ends of games are taxing too, as exhaustion sets in.
sentences.translation: 但棋局末尾也很费脑力，因为疲惫会逐渐袭来。
difficult_points: But 表示并非只有开局难，结尾也困难。
taxing 表示耗费精力或令人疲惫。
too 与前一句 tough 呼应，表示同样有难度。
as 引导原因或时间状语从句，sets in 表示疲劳开始出现。

sentences.sentence: When Gareyev is tired, his recall can get patchy.
sentences.translation: 当加列耶夫疲惫时，他的回忆可能会变得不完整。
difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，说明记忆变差的条件。
recall 作名词，表示回忆能力或回忆结果。
get patchy 表示变得断断续续、不完整。

sentences.sentence: He sometimes makes moves based on only a fragmented memory of the pieces' positions.
sentences.translation: 他有时会仅凭对棋子位置的零碎记忆来走棋。

structure.text: based on only a fragmented memory

difficult_points: makes moves 指在棋局中走棋。
based on... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 moves。
only a fragmented memory 强调记忆并不完整。
the pieces' positions 中所有格修饰 positions，指棋子的位置。

sentences.sentence: The scientists first had Gareyev perform some standard memory tests.
sentences.translation: 科学家们首先让加列耶夫做了一些标准记忆测试。
difficult_points: first 表明测试流程的第一步。
had Gareyev perform 是使役结构，have 后接宾语和原形动词。
standard memory tests 指常规记忆能力测试，而不是专门棋类测试。

sentences.sentence: These assessed his ability to hold numbers, pictures and words in mind.
sentences.translation: 这些测试评估了他在脑中保持数字、图片和词语的能力。

structure.text: his ability to hold numbers, pictures and words in mind
to hold numbers, pictures and words in mind

difficult_points: These 指上一句的 standard memory tests。
ability to hold... 是 ability 后接不定式说明能力内容。
numbers, pictures and words 并列，表示多种记忆材料。
in mind 表示在脑中保持。

sentences.sentence: One classic test measures how many numbers a person can repeat, both forwards and backwards, soon after hearing them.
sentences.translation: 一项经典测试会测量一个人在听到数字后不久，能正向和反向重复多少个数字。

structure.text: how many numbers a person can repeat

difficult_points: how many numbers... 是嵌入式疑问结构，作 measures 的宾语。
both forwards and backwards 表示正向和反向两个方向。
soon after hearing them 是时间状语，说明测试在听到数字后不久进行。
them 指 numbers。

sentences.sentence: Most people manage about seven.
sentences.translation: 大多数人能做到大约七个。
difficult_points: manage 在这里表示“能够做到”，不是管理。
about seven 省略了 numbers，需要联系上一句补出。
Most people 提供普通人的基准表现，用于和 Gareyev 比较。

sentences.sentence: 'He was not exceptional on any of these standard tests,' said Rissman.
sentences.translation: 里斯曼说：“他在这些标准测试中的任何一项上都并不出众。”

structure.text: 'He was not exceptional on any of these standard tests,'
on any of these standard tests

difficult_points: 引号内是否定评价，说明常规记忆测试未显示超常能力。
not exceptional 表示并不例外或并不出众。
any of these standard tests 强调所有这些常规测试都如此。
said Rissman 是后置引述结构。

sentences.sentence: 'We didn't find anything other than playing chess that he seems to be supremely gifted at.'
sentences.translation: “除了下国际象棋之外，我们没有发现他在其他任何事情上似乎有极高天赋。”

structure.text: that he seems to be supremely gifted at

difficult_points: didn't find anything 是否定结构，表示没有发现其他突出能力。
other than playing chess 表示“除了下棋之外”。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 anything。
be gifted at 表示在某方面有天赋，supremely 加强程度。

sentences.sentence: But next came the brain scans.
sentences.translation: 但接下来进行的是脑部扫描。
difficult_points: But 引出测试方式的转折：常规记忆测试之后是脑扫描。
next 位于句首，句子采用倒装语序 came the brain scans。
the brain scans 是逻辑主语，表示下一步出现或进行的项目。

sentences.sentence: With Gareyev lying down in the machine, Rissman looked at how well connected the various regions of the chess player's brain were.
sentences.translation: 加列耶夫躺在机器里时，里斯曼观察了这位棋手大脑各区域之间连接得有多好。

structure.text: With Gareyev lying down in the machine
how well connected the various regions of the chess player's brain were
the various regions of the chess player's brain

difficult_points: With Gareyev lying down... 是 with 复合结构，说明扫描时的背景状态。
looked at 表示研究或查看，不是单纯看一眼。
how well connected... 是嵌入式疑问结构，作 looked at 的宾语。
the chess player's brain 指 Gareyev 的大脑。

sentences.sentence: Though the results are tentative and as yet unpublished, the scans found much greater than average communication between parts of Gareyev's brain that make up what is called the frontoparietal control network.
sentences.translation: 尽管这些结果还只是初步的，而且尚未发表，扫描发现，加列耶夫大脑中构成所谓额顶控制网络的各部分之间，交流程度远高于平均水平。

structure.text: Though the results are tentative and as yet unpublished
that make up what is called the frontoparietal control network

difficult_points: Though 引导让步状语从句，提醒结果仍是初步且未发表的。
much greater than average 修饰 communication，表示连接交流水平显著高于平均。
between parts of Gareyev's brain 说明交流发生在大脑各部分之间。
that 引导定语从句修饰 parts，what is called... 是从句中的名词性结构。

sentences.sentence: Of 63 people scanned alongside the chess player, only one or two scored more highly on the measure.
sentences.translation: 在与这位棋手一同接受扫描的63人中，只有一两个人在这一指标上得分更高。

structure.text: Of 63 people scanned alongside the chess player

difficult_points: Of 63 people... 表示在63人这个范围内比较。
scanned alongside the chess player 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 people。
only one or two 强调高于 Gareyev 的人数很少。
on the measure 指在前文的连接交流指标上。

sentences.sentence: 'You use this network in almost any complex task.
sentences.translation: “你在几乎任何复杂任务中都会使用这个网络。
difficult_points: this network 指上一句的 frontoparietal control network。
almost any complex task 表示该网络用途非常广泛。
引号尚未闭合，说明引语会在下一句继续。

sentences.sentence: It helps you to allocate attention, keep rules in mind, and work out whether you should be responding or not,' said Rissman.
sentences.translation: 它帮助你分配注意力、记住规则，并判断你是否应该作出反应，”里斯曼说。

structure.text: to allocate attention, keep rules in mind, and work out
whether you should be responding or not

difficult_points: It 指 frontoparietal control network。
to allocate, keep, and work out 是并列不定式结构，共同说明网络的功能。
whether...or not 引导宾语从句，作 work out 的内容。
said Rissman 是引语后的报道分句。

sentences.sentence: It was not the only hint of something special in Gareyev's brain.
sentences.translation: 这并不是加列耶夫大脑中存在某种特殊之处的唯一迹象。

structure.text: of something special in Gareyev's brain

difficult_points: It 指上一段发现的额顶控制网络连接异常。
not the only hint 表示还有其他迹象。
something special in Gareyev's brain 指他大脑中可能存在的特殊连接或机制。

sentences.sentence: The scans also suggest that Gareyev's visual network is more highly connected to other brain parts than usual.
sentences.translation: 扫描还表明，加列耶夫的视觉网络与其他大脑部分之间的连接程度也高于通常水平。

structure.text: that Gareyev's visual network is more highly connected to other brain parts than usual
more highly connected to other brain parts than usual

difficult_points: also suggest 表示扫描还提供了另一条线索。
that 引导 suggest 的宾语从句。
more highly connected... than usual 是比较结构，说明连接程度异常高。
visual network 指处理视觉信息的大脑网络。

sentences.sentence: Initial results suggest that the areas of his brain that process visual images – such as chess boards – may have stronger links to other brain regions, and so be more powerful than normal.
sentences.translation: 初步结果表明，他大脑中处理视觉图像的区域——例如棋盘图像——可能与其他脑区有更强的连接，因此也可能比正常情况更强大。

structure.text: that the areas of his brain
may have stronger links to other brain regions, and so be more powerful than normal

difficult_points: that the areas... 引导 suggest 的宾语从句，主语是 the areas of his brain。
that process visual images 是定语从句，修饰 areas。
破折号中的 such as chess boards 举例说明 visual images。
may have... and so be... 是并列谓语，说明更强连接可能带来更强功能。

sentences.sentence: While the analyses are not finalised yet, they may hold the first clues to Gareyev's extraordinary ability.
sentences.translation: 虽然分析尚未最终完成，但它们可能包含解释加列耶夫非凡能力的第一批线索。

structure.text: While the analyses are not finalised yet
the first clues to Gareyev's extraordinary ability

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，表示尽管分析还没最终完成。
they 指前文的 analyses 或 initial results。
may hold 表示可能包含，语气谨慎。
the first clues to... 表示解释其能力的初步线索。

sentences.sentence: For the world record attempt, Gareyev hopes to play 47 blindfold games at once in about 16 hours.
sentences.translation: 为了这次世界纪录尝试，加列耶夫希望在约16小时内同时进行47盘蒙眼棋。
difficult_points: For the world record attempt 表示此次行动的目的或背景。
hopes to play 后接不定式，说明他的目标。
47 blindfold games at once 是挑战内容，强调数量和同时性。
in about 16 hours 表示计划完成这些棋局的时间范围。

sentences.sentence: He will need to win 80% to claim the title.
sentences.translation: 他需要赢下80%的棋局才能获得这一称号。
difficult_points: will need to 表示未来必须达到的条件。
80% 省略了 of the games，需要从上下文补出。
to claim the title 是目的不定式，说明赢80%的意义。
the title 指世界纪录头衔。

sentences.sentence: 'I don't worry too much about the winning percentage, that's never been an issue for me,' he said.
sentences.translation: 他说：“我不太担心胜率，那对我来说从来不是问题。”

structure.text: 'I don't worry too much about the winning percentage
that's never been an issue for me

difficult_points: don't worry too much about 表示“不太担心”，语气不是完全不在意。
that 指 the winning percentage，即胜率。
has never been an issue 使用现在完成时，强调一直以来都不是问题。
he said 是引语后的报道分句。

sentences.sentence: 'The most important part of blindfold chess for me is that I have found the one thing that I can fully dedicate myself to.
sentences.translation: “对我来说，蒙眼国际象棋最重要的部分在于，我找到了那件可以全身心投入的事。

structure.text: 'The most important part of blindfold chess for me
that I have found the one thing
that I can fully dedicate myself to

difficult_points: The most important part... for me 是长主语，说明个人意义。
that I have found... 是表语从句，解释最重要之处。
the one thing 后的 that 从句说明这件事的性质。
dedicate myself to 中 to 是介词，后接投入的对象。

sentences.sentence: I miss having an obsession.'
sentences.translation: 我怀念拥有一种痴迷的感觉。”
difficult_points: miss 后接动名词 having，表示怀念某种状态。
obsession 在这里指强烈投入或痴迷的目标。
句末引号表明这是上一句直接引语的延续和结束。
